overview: A minimalistic public message board with a built-in Nomad Network page browser. Post and read messages, or browse Nomad Network pages by node hash and path — all in one place.
features: Public message board with persistent posts
Post messages with name and content
Browse Nomad Network pages by node hash and path
Real-time page content polling every 3 seconds
Tab switcher between Messages and Browse Nomad
Preformatted page content display with scrolling
Backend HTTP API for messages and Nomad browsing
